creator: nobutaka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 215511
Patch of editors/emacs-devel

The update of editors/emacs-devel to 2020-06-01 commit c59e878 breaks package build of editors/apel and this breakage affects all ports that depend on editors/apel.

This breakage can be fixed by the following commit of emacs.

https://github.com/emacs-mirror/emacs/commit/188dc2e5a3cb2de69ec14715ba288ab1e30da6eb

So please update editors/emacs-devel to this commit or later.

I confirmed that packages of editors/emacs-devel and editors/apel were built successfully by poudriere with updated editors/emacs-devel to 2020-06-12 commit 459bd56.
